facebook.content:
"And he gave some to be apostles, some prophets, some evangelists, some pastors and teachers, for the equipping of the saints for the work of ministry, for building up the body of Christ, until we all attain to the unity of the faith and of the knowledge of the Son of God, to mature manhood, to the measure of the stature of the fullness of Christ."

We cannot afford to be stagnant in our faith, merely 'attending' church but not participating in the work of the Kingdom.
facebook.fullPost:
"And he gave some to be apostles, some prophets, some evangelists, some pastors and teachers, for the equipping of the saints for the work of ministry, for building up the body of Christ, until we all attain to the unity of the faith and of the knowledge of the Son of God, to mature manhood, to the measure of the stature of the fullness of Christ."

We cannot afford to be stagnant in our faith, merely 'attending' church but not participating in the work of the Kingdom.

Start your Kingdom journey
https://increasingfaith.net/journey.html

#KingdomOfGod #IncreasingFaith #Jesus

instagram.content:
Matthew 16:19 - "I will give you the keys of the kingdom of heaven; whatever you bind on earth will be bound in heaven, and whatever you loose on earth will be loosed in heaven."

Pastor Curtis: The keys to the Kingdom are not a mere symbol – they're a declaration of authority. Will you wield your influence to bring heaven to earth, or let the status quo dictate your actions?

tiktok.content:
"For the kingdom of God is not a matter of eating and drinking, but of righteousness, peace and joy in the Holy Spirit." Romans 14:17

The Kingdom of God isn't just a byproduct of our spirituality - it's the core of our identity.
